productDisplayName: Crocs Women Casual Grey Casual Shoes
description: If you expect your footwear to be extremely comfortable coupled with great looks, you've come to the right place! These pumps from crocs pamper your feet all day long as you go about doing your daily chores with even greater enthusiasm. Pair them with just about any kind of casual wear for a fab look.UpperSuper soft, translucent TPU upper with rounded toe and stylish trim offering a comfortable, stylish lookSlip-on silhouette with TPU interior provides an easy, snug FitMidsoleEVA footbed with multi-directional lines in the silhouette of the foot for ergonomic comfort and acupressure benefitsCrocs branding on mid-heel for comfort and styleFungus, bacteria and odour resistant for a healthy wear even in wet conditionsOutsoleNon-marking outsole delivers excellent traction on a variety of surfacesMulti-directional textured leaf-shaped grooves in the forefoot and back foot for ample grip, stability and comfortshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
